column1: # katugen template registry — one row per matugen template.
# - `id`              : matugen [templates.<id>] section name. Must be unique.
# - `template_relpath`: path under templates/ in this repo.
# - `marker_dir`      : if this directory exists at install time, the template is
#                       enabled. Use ALWAYS to install unconditionally.
# - `output_path`     : where matugen writes the generated file. ~ is expanded
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored. Tab-separated.
# ---- KDE / Plasma (always installed — this is the whole point of katugen) ----
# ---- Firefox via pywalfox (always — script will pywalfox-update if installed) ----
# starship: dropped — starship has no `include` directive, so a separate
# matugen-rendered TOML cannot be merged into the user's starship.toml
# without hand-editing. If you want it back, set output_path to your
# vscode: dropped — code.json is a VS Code *theme extension* descriptor, not
# a file VS Code reads on its own. Packaging it as an extension is out of
# scope. Use a wallpaper-aware extension like "Theme Wallpaper" instead.
# Symlink these into your active profile's chrome/ directory.
